title: Project Telos Fifth-Wave OSS Proof Showcase Claims

claims.text: The fifth-wave fixture scout writes a project-telos.oss-scout/v1 packet for pandas-dev/pandas#66050 with priority 70.
claims.falsification: The scout output is missing, has the wrong schema, names a different candidate, or reports a priority other than 70.

claims.text: The ready OSS showcase fixture produces a project-telos.oss-pr-readiness/v1 packet with pr_ready true, operator_next_action open-pr, and verdict MATCH.
claims.falsification: The generated ready packet is missing, has the wrong schema, is not PR-ready, chooses a different next action, or carries a non-MATCH verdict.

claims.text: The blocked OSS showcase fixture produces a packet with pr_ready false, operator_next_action revise, verdict UNVERIFIABLE, and explicit missing-evidence blockers.
claims.falsification: The generated blocked packet is PR-ready, chooses open-pr, lacks the expected blockers, or carries a MATCH verdict.

claims.text: The fifth-wave demo document labels the OSS showcase as fixture-only and warns not to post it as an actual pandas fix or live GitHub scout result.
claims.falsification: The demo document omits the fixture-only boundary or claims Project Telos fixed pandas.

claims.text: The fifth-wave content queue packages both the ready fixture and the blocked fixture for the parallel posting session.
claims.falsification: The content queue omits either the ready packet or the blocked packet.
